nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=46 beats='Nova spreads the launch pad tarp in the sunny backyard for a backyard rocket launch party; the crate is empty and no the rocket pups are here yet; she claps her paws and decides what to fetch first'>>

choices.label: Go ask the soda pop for a bottle of fizzy fuel.
Go pick shiny star stickers at the glitter patch.
Go find the shiny toy rocket.
Go fetch the bright countdown banner.
Go wake Pepper the pup in a blanket under the porch.
Go find the little walkie-talkie.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='Nova pads to the fizzy soda fountain to ask for a bottle of fizzy fuel; the soda pop hum kindly in the sun; she can ask nicely and wait or poke the fizzy soda fountain to hurry them along'>>

choices.label: Ask the soda pop nicely and wait.
Poke the fizzy soda fountain to hurry.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='the soda pop fill a bottle of fizzy fuel and Nova hugs it close; the backyard rocket launch party is growing; she can carry it back to the launch pad tarp or call the rocket pups and start the backyard rocket launch party now'>>

choices.label: Carry a bottle of fizzy fuel back to the launch pad tarp.
Ring the countdown whistle and start the backyard rocket launch party.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=44 beats='Nova pokes the fizzy soda fountain and out floats Foamy Fizz that chase her in a silly circle round the sunny backyard; nobody is stung and she giggles, trotting back to the launch pad tarp to try again the gentle way'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='Nova skips to the glitter patch for a sheet of star stickers; plump ripe ones sit low and shiny; she can pick the easy low berries or stretch up for the wobbly high ones'>>

choices.label: Pick the easy low shiny star stickers.
Stretch for the wobbly high ones.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='Nova's basket fills with sweet shiny star stickers that stain her paws pink; the backyard rocket launch party keeps growing; she can carry them back to the launch pad tarp or call the rocket pups and start the backyard rocket launch party now'>>

choices.label: Carry a sheet of star stickers back to the launch pad tarp.
Ring the countdown whistle and start the backyard rocket launch party.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=44 beats='Nova stretches for the high shiny star stickers, the branch springs back, and a sheet of star stickers tips into the soft grass with a plop; Sticky Sparkles roll everywhere and she laughs, heading back to the launch pad tarp to start over'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='Nova remembers the shiny toy rocket is somewhere in the toolshed shelf; she hunts for it happily; she can follow the little bounce marks or just dive into the grass headfirst'>>

choices.label: Follow the little bounce marks.
Dive into the toolshed shelf.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='there in the toolshed shelf sits the shiny toy rocket, just right for a backyard rocket launch party game; the fun is growing; she can roll it back to the launch pad tarp or call the rocket pups and start the backyard rocket launch party now'>>

choices.label: Roll the shiny toy rocket back to the launch pad tarp.
Ring the countdown whistle and start the backyard rocket launch party.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=44 beats='Nova dives into the toolshed shelf and pops up with a Wobbly Spin on her nose instead of the shiny toy rocket; she sneezes a giggly sneeze and trots back to the launch pad tarp to look for the shiny toy rocket again later'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='Nova wants the bright countdown banner for the breezy the sunny backyard; it lies folded by the old garden gate; she can carry it gently under her arm or let it flap wide open in the wind'>>

choices.label: Carry the bright countdown banner gently under her arm.
Let the bright countdown banner flap open in the wind.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='Nova tucks the bright countdown banner safely under her arm, ready for flying; the backyard rocket launch party keeps growing; she can bring it back to the launch pad tarp or call the rocket pups and start the backyard rocket launch party now'>>

choices.label: Bring the bright countdown banner back to the launch pad tarp.
Ring the countdown whistle and start the backyard rocket launch party.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=44 beats='Nova lets the bright countdown banner flap open and a gust tugs it into a Tangled Banner that wraps the string around a fence post; she untangles the muddle, laughing, and heads back to the launch pad tarp to try again'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=44 beats='Pepper the pup dozes on a blanket under the porch and Nova wants to invite him to the backyard rocket launch party; his round eyes are shut tight; she can hoot softly to wake him gently or shake the whole branch'>>

choices.label: Hoot softly to wake Pepper the pup gently.
Shake the whole branch.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='Pepper the pup blinks his big eyes, yawns, and says yes to the backyard rocket launch party with a happy hoot; the rocket pups are growing; Nova can walk him back to the launch pad tarp or call the rocket pups and start the backyard rocket launch party now'>>

choices.label: Walk Pepper the pup back to the launch pad tarp.
Ring the countdown whistle and start the backyard rocket launch party.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=44 beats='Nova shakes the branch and a Heap of Cushions tumbles down and buries her in a giggly pile; Pepper the pup only snores a little louder; she brushes off the leaves and heads back to the launch pad tarp to try again'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='Nova looks for the little walkie-talkie to play backyard rocket launch party tunes; it sits closed on a wooden crate; she can lift the lid carefully and peek inside or give the handle a big fast wind'>>

choices.label: Lift the lid carefully.
Give the handle a big fast wind.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='the little walkie-talkie tinkles a soft, sweet backyard rocket launch party tune and Nova hums along; the backyard rocket launch party keeps growing; she can carry it back to the launch pad tarp or call the rocket pups and start the backyard rocket launch party now'>>

choices.label: Carry the little walkie-talkie back to the launch pad tarp.
Ring the countdown whistle and start the backyard rocket launch party.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=44 beats='Nova winds the handle too fast and the little walkie-talkie plays a Crackly Squawk that makes her paws dance all wrong; she giggles at the muddle and heads back to the launch pad tarp to try again slowly'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='Nova rings the countdown whistle and the rocket pups come waddling from every corner of the sunny backyard; the launch pad tarp is ready at last; she waves them all over to the launch pad tarp'>>

choices.label: Welcome the rocket pups in.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='the rocket pups settle in a happy ring on the launch pad tarp, wiggling with excitement; everything Nova fetched is piled up in the middle; she looks at the growing feast and gets ready to begin'>>

choices.label: Lay out all the backyard rocket launch party treats.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='Nova spreads out a bottle of fizzy fuel, a sheet of star stickers, and all the treats in the warm sun; the rocket pups lick their lips and wiggle their paws; she decides how to start the backyard rocket launch party fun'>>

choices.label: Share a bottle of fizzy fuel and a sheet of star stickers.
Start a backyard rocket launch party game.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=40 beats='a bottle of fizzy fuel and a sheet of star stickers go round the circle and everyone munches happily in the sunshine; the backyard rocket launch party is merry and full; Nova thinks of the coziest way to keep the good fun going'>>

choices.label: Sing The Countdown Song.
Wind up the little walkie-talkie and sway.
Curl up for a cozy nap in the sun.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=36 beats='the rocket pups are ready to play in the breezy the sunny backyard and Nova claps with joy; the backyard rocket launch party is a happy, growing party; she decides which cheerful game the rocket pups should have'>>

choices.label: Roll the shiny toy rocket around the ring.
Fly the bright countdown banner in the breeze.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=46 beats='everyone joins paws and sings The Countdown Song under the warm sun, swaying together in the sunny backyard; Nova's backyard rocket launch party has come together just perfectly, and her heart is as full as a bottle of fizzy fuel'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='the little walkie-talkie tinkles its sweet tune and all the rocket pups sway and hum along on the launch pad tarp; Nova's backyard rocket launch party is cozy and complete, and she beams at every one of her happy friends'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='full of a bottle of fizzy fuel and a sheet of star stickers, the rocket pups and Nova curl up in a soft heap on the launch pad tarp for a happy afternoon nap; the backyard rocket launch party she built piece by piece is perfect and peaceful'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='the shiny toy rocket rolls round and round the giggling ring of the rocket pups in the sunny backyard; Nova's backyard rocket launch party is a bouncy, happy success and all the rocket pups cheer for one more roll'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=44 beats='the bright countdown banner dips and soars over the sunny backyard while the rocket pups cheer from the launch pad tarp; Nova's backyard rocket launch party has come together beautifully and she flies the bright countdown banner proudly in the warm breeze'>>
